items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: File upload vulnerability leading to privilege escalation
items.summary: A critical file upload vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source (CVSS score: 9.6) could lead to privilege escalation.

items.title: Improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability leading to arbitrary code execution
items.summary: A critical improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source (CVSS score: 9.1) could lead to arbitrary code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in the Mirasvit Cache Warmer extension allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie. CISA has added this flaw to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog due to active exploitation.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: An incorrect authorization vulnerability in Adobe Commerce (CVSS 3.1 base score of 7.5) allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API, named 'PolyShell' by Sansec, allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image. Attacks have been observed on a high percentage of stores.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, or gain unauthorized access to store data.
